title: Assertion fault on SQL input
bug_features_seed: CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE t1(id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE t2(mx_payload INT CHECK(mx_payload >= 0));
CREATE TRIGGER trig1 AFTER INSERT ON t1 FOR EACH ROW BEGIN INSERT INTO t2(mx_payload) VALUES (NEW.id);
INSERT INTO t2(mx_payload) VALUES (0), (1), (42), (42e-300) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE mx_payload = mx_payload;
key_bug_features: IF NOT EXISTS trigger with multiple RETURNING clauses
